title: Steady State Endurance
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: ramp from 45% → 65% FTP
- 70 min at 65–72% FTP, cadence 85–95 rpm
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Long Endurance Ride
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: ramp from 45% → 68% FTP
- 120 min at 65–75% FTP, cadence 80–95 rpm
- 15 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Tempo Sprinkle Endurance
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- Main set (70 min):
- 15 min at 68% FTP
- 5 min at 82% FTP
- 15 min at 68% FTP
- 5 min at 85% FTP
- 15 min at 68% FTP
- 5 min at 82% FTP
- 10 min at 68% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Cadence Pyramids
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- Main set at 68% FTP, changing cadence every 5 min:
- 5 min @ 80 rpm → 5 min @ 90 rpm → 5 min @ 100 rpm → 5 min @ 110 rpm → 5
min @ 100 rpm → 5 min @ 90 rpm → 5 min @ 80 rpm
- Repeat pyramid once more (shorter: 3 min each step)
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Classic Tempo Blocks
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 3 × 15 min at 83–88% FTP, cadence 85–95 rpm
- 5 min rest between intervals at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Extended Tempo
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–68% FTP
- 2 × 30 min at 82–87% FTP
- 10 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Tempo with Surges
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 3 × 15 min at 85% FTP, each block containing:
- Every 5 min: 15-second surge at 130% FTP, then return to 85%
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP between blocks
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Progressive Tempo
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 40 min continuous:
- 10 min at 78% FTP
- 10 min at 82% FTP
- 10 min at 86% FTP
- 10 min at 90% FTP
- 10 min rest at 50% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Sweet Spot Intervals
goal: Maximize threshold adaptation with manageable fatigue
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 3 × 15 min at 88–93% FTP, cadence 85–95 rpm
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Extended Sweet Spot
goal: Long duration sweet spot for advanced riders
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–68% FTP
- 2 × 25 min at 90–94% FTP
- 10 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Sweet Spot Progression
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- Set 1: 12 min at 88% FTP → 5 min rest
- Set 2: 12 min at 90% FTP → 5 min rest
- Set 3: 12 min at 93% FTP → 5 min rest
- Set 4: 9 min at 95% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Sweet Spot Over-Unders (Intro)
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 3 × 12 min alternating:
- 2 min at 92% FTP (“over”)
- 2 min at 85% FTP (“under”)
- Repeat 3× within each block
- 6 min rest at 55% FTP between blocks
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Classic 2 × 20
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 2 × 20 min at 95–100% FTP, cadence 85–95 rpm
- 10 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Threshold Steps
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–68% FTP
- 3 × 10 min:
- Set 1: 95% FTP
- Set 2: 98% FTP
- Set 3: 100% FTP
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Over-Under Intervals
goal: Lactate tolerance and clearance at threshold
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–68% FTP
- 3 × 12 min alternating:
- 2 min at 105% FTP (“over”)
- 2 min at 90% FTP (“under”)
- Repeat 3× within each block
- 8 min rest at 55% FTP between blocks
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: FTP Long Block
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 1 × 30 min at 95–100% FTP
- 10 min rest at 55% FTP
- 1 × 20 min at 95–100% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Criss-Cross Intervals
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–68% FTP
- 3 × 10 min:
- Alternate every 30 seconds between 92% and 105% FTP
- 7 min rest at 55% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Threshold Ramp
goal: Finding and holding peak sustainable power
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 2 × 15 min ramp:
- Start at 88% FTP, increase by ~2% every 3 min → finish at 100%
- 7 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Classic 5 × 5
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP, include 2 × 30s at 110%
- 5 × 5 min at 106–115% FTP, cadence 95–105 rpm
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between intervals
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Billat 30/30s
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 sets of:
- 10 × (30s at 120% FTP / 30s at 50% FTP)
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 4 × 8 VO2max
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 × 8 min at 106–112% FTP, cadence 90–100 rpm
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between intervals
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: VO2max Pyramids
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- Pyramid (rest = interval duration at 50% FTP):
- 2 min at 115% → 3 min at 112% → 4 min at 110% → 5 min at 108% → 4 min at
110% → 3 min at 112% → 2 min at 115%
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 40/20 Repeats
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 sets of:
- 8 × (40s at 125% FTP / 20s at 50% FTP)
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: VO2max Over-Unders
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 × 8 min:
- 2 min at 95% FTP
- 1 min at 115% FTP
- Repeat pattern within each 8-min block
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Norwegian 4 × 4
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 × 4 min at 110–118% FTP, cadence 95–105 rpm
- 3 min active rest at 50% FTP between intervals
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Descending VO2max
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- Descending intervals:
- 6 min at 108% FTP → 5 min rest
- 5 min at 110% FTP → 4 min rest
- 4 min at 112% FTP → 4 min rest
- 3 min at 115% FTP → 3 min rest
- 2 min at 120% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Tabata Protocol
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP, include 3 × 10s sprints
- 3 sets of:
- 8 × (20s ALL OUT ~170% FTP / 10s complete rest or very easy spin)
- 5 min easy spin between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Anaerobic Repeats
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 2 sets of:
- 6 × 1 min at 130–140% FTP / 2 min rest at 50% FTP
- 8 min rest between sets at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 2-Minute Power
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 6 × 2 min at 125–135% FTP, cadence 95–110 rpm
- 4 min rest at 50% FTP between intervals
- 15 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Microbursts
goal: Anaerobic power with minimal rest, simulate racing
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 sets of:
- 10 × (15s at 150% FTP / 15s at 55% FTP)
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Anaerobic Ladders
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 2 sets of ladder:
- 30s at 150% FTP → 1 min rest
- 45s at 140% FTP → 1.5 min rest
- 60s at 130% FTP → 2 min rest
- 90s at 125% FTP → 3 min rest
- 60s at 130% FTP → 2 min rest
- 45s at 140% FTP → 1.5 min rest
- 30s at 150% FTP → 5 min rest between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 3-Minute Anaerobic Blocks
goal: Extend anaerobic tolerance, bridge to VO2max
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 5 × 3 min at 120–130% FTP
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between intervals
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Sprint Repeats
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP, include 3 × 6s sprints
- 8 × 10s ALL OUT (seated or standing), max cadence
- 5 min easy spin at 50% FTP between sprints
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Standing Start Sprints
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 6 × 15s standing start sprints from near stop (~5 km/h), max effort
- 5 min recovery spin at 50% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Sprint-Endurance Combo
goal: Sprint power layered on fatigued legs
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 40 min at 72% FTP with:
- Every 8 min: 10s max sprint, then resume endurance pace
- 15 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Explosive Repeats
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 2 sets of:
- 5 × 8s all-out sprint / 90s easy spin
- 5 min rest between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Crit Simulation
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 30 min continuous:
- Alternate: 45s at 130% FTP / 90s at 80% FTP
- 10 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Race Breakaway Simulation
goal: Sustain above-threshold after a hard effort
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- Attack: 2 min at 140% FTP
- Bridge: 5 min at 105% FTP
- Sustain: 15 min at 95% FTP
- 10 min rest at 55% FTP
- Repeat attack → bridge → sustain one more time
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Group Ride Simulation
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 50 min main set at 75% FTP with random surges:
- Every 3–5 min: 20–45s surge at 120–150% FTP (vary each time)
- Return to 75% FTP after each surge
- 10 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Climbing Repeats
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 × 10 min at 95–100% FTP, cadence 70–80 rpm (simulate climbing)
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP, cadence 90+ rpm
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Time Trial Simulation
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–75% FTP, include 1 × 1 min at 100%
- 45 min at 92–98% FTP, steady cadence 85–95 rpm
- Negative split: first 20 min at 92%, next 15 min at 95%, final 10 min at
98%
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Kitchen Sink
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- Block 1 – Threshold: 10 min at 95% FTP → 5 min rest
- Block 2 – VO2max: 4 × 3 min at 110% / 3 min rest → 5 min rest
- Block 3 – Anaerobic: 6 × 1 min at 130% / 2 min rest → 5 min rest
- Block 4 – Sprint: 4 × 10s max / 2 min rest
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Gravel Simulation
goal: Variable terrain, sustained effort with power spikes
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 60 min main set:
- 8 min at 75% FTP (gravel road)
- 3 min at 110% FTP (short punchy climb)
- 5 min at 68% FTP (recovery descent)
- 4 min at 95% FTP (threshold push)
- Repeat cycle ~3–4 times
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Active Recovery
structure:
*
- 45 min at 45–55% FTP, cadence 85–95 rpm

title: Recovery with Openers
structure:
*
- 15 min at 50% FTP
- Main set:
- 15 min at 55% FTP, every 5 min include 1 × 10s at 120% FTP
- 10 min at 55% FTP
- 3 × 30s build from 60% → 100% FTP, 2 min easy between
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Pre-Race Activation
goal: Prime legs and nervous system before competition
structure:
*
- 10 min at 55% FTP
- 5 min at 70% FTP
- 1 min at 90% FTP → 2 min easy
- 1 min at 100% FTP → 2 min easy
- 30s at 120% FTP → 2 min easy
- 10s sprint → 5 min easy
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Polarized Z2 + VO2max
goal: Polarized model — low and high, nothing in between
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 20 min at 68% FTP
- 5 × 4 min at 110–115% FTP / 4 min at 50% FTP
- 20 min at 68% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Polarized Sprint Day
goal: Polarized low-intensity base with neuromuscular bursts
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 50 min at 65–70% FTP with:
- Every 10 min: 8s all-out sprint, then resume Z2
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Seiler 4 × 8
goal: VO2max accumulation in a polarized framework
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 × 8 min at 108–112% FTP
- 4 min rest at 50% FTP
- 20 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Big Gear Force Reps
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 6 × 3 min at 85% FTP, cadence 50–60 rpm (big gear)
- 3 min rest at 55% FTP, high cadence 100+ rpm
- 15 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Single-Leg Drills
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 4 rounds of:
- 2 min right leg only at ~50% FTP
- 2 min left leg only at ~50% FTP
- 2 min both legs at 70% FTP
- 2 min rest
- 10 min at 65% FTP
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Torque Intervals
goal: Max force per pedal stroke, climbing strength
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 3 × 8 min:
- Alternate every 2 min: 55 rpm at 90% FTP → 90 rpm at 75% FTP
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Ronnestad Intervals
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 sets of:
- 3 × (30s at 130% FTP / 15s at 50% FTP) + 3 min rest
- 10 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Gimenez Intervals
goal: VO2max using sustained sub-max and supra-max alternation
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 × 9 min:
- Alternate: 1 min at 108% FTP / 4 min at 90% FTP → repeat
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Miracle Intervals
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 sets of:
- 10 × (20s at MAX / 10s easy spin)
- 5 min recovery spin between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Ramp Test (FTP Assessment)
structure:
*
- 5 min warm-up at 50% FTP
- Ramp starting at 100 W, increasing 20 W/min until failure
- Note the 1-min max power achieved
- FTP estimate = 75% of 1-min max power
- 10 min cool-down: easy spin

title: 20-Minute FTP Test
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 5 min blow-out effort at 110% estimated FTP (clears anaerobic reserves)
- 5 min easy spin at 50%
- 20 min MAX sustainable effort (pace evenly)
- FTP = 95% of 20-min average power
- 10 min cool-down: easy spin

title: Kolie Moore FTP Test
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 55–70% FTP
- 30–40 min at best sustainable effort
- Start conservatively at ~93% estimated FTP
- Gradually increase if feeling strong
- Note when you can no longer sustain → that’s close to FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Rønnestad 30/15s
goal: Superior VO2max stimulus via short intervals
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 sets of:
- 13 × (30s at MAX sustainable / 15s at 50% FTP)
- Each set lasts ~9 min 45s
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Rønnestad Fast-Start 5 × 5
goal: Accelerated VO2max response via hard-start pacing
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 5 × 5 min:
- First 90s at 120% FTP (fast start)
- Remaining 3.5 min at 100–105% FTP
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Bossi Oscillating Intervals
goal: VO2max via variable-intensity within each interval
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 6 × 5 min at ~77% MAP (~95% FTP average):
- Within each 5 min: 3 × 30s surge at 100% MAP (~120% FTP), remainder at
~90% FTP
- 2.5 min rest at 50% FTP between intervals
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Billat 30/30s (Extended)
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 2 sets of:
- 18 × (30s at 130–140% FTP / 30s at 50–60% FTP)
- Each set = 18 min
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Seiler 4 × 4 vs 4 × 8 Hybrid
goal: Best of both Seiler protocols in one session
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- Block A: 2 × 8 min at 108% FTP / 4 min rest
- Block B: 4 × 4 min at 115% FTP / 3 min rest
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Hard-Start Decreasing VO2max
goal: Maximize time near VO2max with fatigue-managed pacing
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 5 × 4 min:
- First 45s at 130% FTP (hard start)
- Remaining 3:15 at self-paced VO2max intensity (~105–115% FTP)
- Allow power to decrease naturally as fatigue accumulates
- 4 min rest at 50% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 40/20 VO2max (MTB Style)
goal: VO2max + anaerobic power, MTB race simulation
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 sets of:
- 6 × (40s at 130% FTP, cadence 70–80 rpm / 20s at 50% FTP)
- Each set = 6 min
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Diabolical Criss-Cross
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 × 12 min:
- Alternate every 1 min: 110% FTP (over) / 90% FTP (under)
- 8 min rest at 55% FTP between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Tempo Over-Unders with Anaerobic Spikes
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 3 × 12 min:
- 20s at 140% FTP (spike)
- 4 min at 85% FTP (tempo)
- 20s at 140% FTP (spike)
- 4 min at 85% FTP (tempo)
- 20s at 140% FTP (spike)
- 3 min at 85% FTP
- 6 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Sweet Spot with VO2max Kicks
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 3 × 15 min at 90% FTP, each block containing:
- At minutes 5 and 10: 1 min at 115% FTP, then return to 90%
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP between blocks
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Ritter-Style Mixed Over-Unders
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 × 10 min:
- 3 min at 92% FTP → 1 min at 108% FTP → 2 min at 88% FTP → 2 min at 105%
FTP → 2 min at 90% FTP
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Progressive Over-Unders
goal: Build threshold tolerance with escalating difficulty
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- Set 1: 10 min (2 min at 88% / 2 min at 100%) → 5 min rest
- Set 2: 10 min (2 min at 90% / 2 min at 105%) → 5 min rest
- Set 3: 10 min (2 min at 92% / 2 min at 108%) → 5 min rest
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: The 30-Minute VO2max Blitz
goal: Maximum training stimulus in minimal time
structure:
*
- 5 min warm-up: ramp 50% → 75% FTP
- 7 × 1 min at MAX effort (~120–130% FTP)
- 1 min rest at 50% FTP between each
- 5 min at 65% FTP
- 4 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 30-Minute Over-Under Express
structure:
*
- 5 min warm-up: ramp 50% → 70% FTP
- 4 × 20s at 120% FTP / 40s easy spin (openers)
- 12 min over-under:
- Alternate 2 min at 95% FTP / 1 min at 105% FTP × 4 cycles
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 30-Minute Speed Intervals
structure:
*
- 5 min warm-up: ramp 50% → 70% FTP
- 4 × 30s sprint (accelerate to max power/cadence) / 30s rest
- 3 min recovery at 55% FTP
- 7 × 1 min at MAX effort / 1 min easy spin
- 4 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 45-Minute Sweet Spot Express
structure:
*
- 8 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 2 × 12 min at 90% FTP
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 45-Minute Tabata + Threshold Combo
structure:
*
- 8 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP, include 2 × 10s sprints
- Set 1: 8 × (20s at ~170% FTP / 10s rest) = 4 min
- 4 min easy spin
- Set 2: 10 min at 95% FTP (threshold)
- 4 min easy spin
- Set 3: 8 × (20s at ~170% FTP / 10s rest) = 4 min
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: 45-Minute Descending Pyramid
structure:
*
- 8 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- Pyramid with equal rest:
- 5 min at 95% FTP → 3 min rest
- 4 min at 105% FTP → 3 min rest
- 3 min at 110% FTP → 2 min rest
- 2 min at 120% FTP → 2 min rest
- 1 min at 135% FTP
- 5 min at 60% FTP
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Gran Fondo Pacing
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 100 min main set:
- 30 min at 70% FTP (pack riding)
- 10 min at 88% FTP (first climb)
- 20 min at 72% FTP (valley)
- 15 min at 92% FTP (main climb)
- 15 min at 65% FTP (descent)
- 10 min at 95% FTP (finish push)
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Cyclocross Race Simulation
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP, include 3 × 8s sprints
- 2 × 15 min “laps”:
- 10s sprint at MAX (start)
- 3 min at 95% FTP
- 20s at 150% FTP (barrier remount)
- 2 min at 90% FTP
- 30s at 140% FTP (short power climb)
- 1 min at 70% FTP
- 10s sprint at MAX (prime)
- 3 min at 95% FTP
- 20s at 150% FTP
- 2 min at 85% FTP
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP between laps
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Road Race Finale Simulation
goal: Practice race-finishing power on fatigued legs
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 40 min at 72% FTP (simulate pack riding)
- 5 min at 95% FTP (tempo increase before finale)
- 3 min at 110% FTP (breakaway attempt)
- 2 min at 75% FTP (brief recovery)
- 1 min at 130% FTP (counter-attack)
- 2 min at 75% FTP
- 5 min at 100% FTP (chase group)
- 30s at MAX (sprint finish)
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: MTB Cross-Country Simulation
goal: XC MTB race demands — punchy climbs, recoveries
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 “laps” of 12 min:
- 10s sprint (start/restart)
- 2 min at 110% FTP, cadence 65–75 rpm (technical climb)
- 1 min at 60% FTP (singletrack recovery)
- 3 min at 95% FTP (fire road climb)
- 1 min at 60% FTP (descent)
- 40s at 140% FTP (punchy rise)
- 2 min at 75% FTP (rolling)
- 3 min rest between laps at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Track Pursuit Preparation
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP, include 2 × 15s at 130%
- 6 × 3 min at 108–115% FTP, cadence 100–110 rpm
- 3 min rest at 50% FTP
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Hill Climb TT Simulation
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 55–70% FTP
- 1 × 30 min at 95–102% FTP, cadence 70–80 rpm
- Stand for 30s every 5 min
- Negative split: first 15 min at 95%, final 15 min at 100%
- 10 min rest at 55% FTP
- 1 × 10 min at 98% FTP (second climb)
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Sweet Spot After Endurance
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 60 min at 68% FTP (endurance base)
- 2 × 15 min at 90% FTP
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Threshold After Tempo
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 30 min at 82% FTP (tempo block)
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP
- 2 × 15 min at 97% FTP
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: VO2max on Tired Legs
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 40 min at 72% FTP (endurance)
- 10 min at 85% FTP (tempo ramp)
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP
- 4 × 4 min at 110% FTP / 4 min rest
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Endurance with Progressive Finale
goal: Negative split pacing, marathon ride prep
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 60 min at 65% FTP
- 30 min at 72% FTP
- 20 min at 82% FTP
- 10 min at 92% FTP
- 10 min at 100% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Spin-Ups
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 6 × spin-up drill:
- From 80 rpm, gradually increase cadence to MAXIMUM sustainable without
bouncing (~130–150+ rpm)
- Hold max cadence for 10s
- 3 min easy spin between
- 10 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Cadence Contrast Intervals
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 4 × 8 min at 85% FTP:
- 2 min at 60 rpm (big gear)
- 2 min at 90 rpm (normal)
- 2 min at 110 rpm (high spin)
- 2 min at 90 rpm (normal)
- 4 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Isolated Leg Training (ILT) + Sweet Spot
goal: Pedaling efficiency before sweet spot work
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 3 rounds of ILT:
- 1 min right leg / 1 min left leg / 1 min both at 50–60% FTP
- 1 min easy spin between rounds
- 5 min at 65% FTP
- 2 × 12 min at 90% FTP
- 5 min rest at 55% FTP
- 5 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Block Day 1: Threshold Focus
goal: First session of a 2–3 day training block
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 × 12 min at 95–100% FTP
- 6 min rest at 55% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Block Day 2: VO2max Focus
goal: Second session, build on Day 1 fatigue
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 5 × 4 min at 110–118% FTP
- 4 min rest at 50% FTP
- 10 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Block Day 3: Tempo + Sprints
goal: Final block day — aerobic work with neuromuscular maintenance
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–65% FTP
- 40 min at 80% FTP with:
- Every 10 min: 10s max sprint, then return to 80%
- 15 min at 65% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Race Day Warm-Up (Road Race)
goal: Optimal activation before mass-start road race
structure:
*
- 5 min at 50% FTP
- 5 min at 65% FTP
- 2 min at 80% FTP
- 1 min at 95% FTP → 1 min easy
- 30s at 110% FTP → 1 min easy
- 10s sprint → 2 min easy
- 10s sprint → coast to start line

title: Race Day Warm-Up (Time Trial)
goal: Peak activation for maximal sustained effort
structure:
*
- 8 min at 55% FTP
- 5 min at 70% FTP
- 3 min at 85% FTP
- 1 min at 100% FTP → 2 min easy
- 30s at 115% FTP → 2 min easy
- 15s sprint → 3 min easy
- 3 min at 60% FTP → to start ramp

title: Interval Day Warm-Up (Detailed)
goal: Thorough preparation for hard interval session
structure:
*
- 5 min at 50% FTP
- 5 min at 65% FTP
- 3 min at 75% FTP
- 3 × (30s at 100% FTP / 30s at 55% FTP)
- 3 min at 55% FTP → begin main set

title: Zwift Race Prep: Pen Start Simulation
goal: Survive the opening surge of virtual races
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 3 × race simulation:
- 30s ALL OUT (race start)
- 3 min at 100% FTP (settle into pack)
- 5 min at 85% FTP (steady state)
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP between simulations
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Zwift Race Finish Kicker
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 × 8 min at 90% FTP, each ending with:
- 30s at MAX sprint
- 4 min rest at 50% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Laursen Pmax/Tmax Protocol
goal: Individualized VO2max intervals based on personal physiology
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 8 × [60% of your Tmax] at Pmax (MAP), 1:2 work:recovery ratio
- Example: if Tmax = 5 min → 8 × 3 min at MAP / 6 min rest
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP
- **How to determine Pmax/Tmax:** Perform a ramp test (25–30 W/min
increase) to find MAP. Next day, ride at MAP until exhaustion = Tmax. Use
60% of Tmax as interval duration.

title: Laursen Supramaximal Sprint Protocol
goal: Sprint-based performance improvement for trained cyclists
structure:
*
- 15 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 12 × 30s at 175% PPO (peak power output from ramp test)
- 4.5 min recovery at 50% FTP between each
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Lindsay 80% MAP Protocol
goal: Race-specific threshold improvement for trained cyclists
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 6–8 × 5 min at 80% MAP (~105% FTP), 1 min recovery at 50% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Stepto Optimal Duration Protocol
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 5 × 4–6 min at 85% PPO (~108% FTP), 4 min rest at 50% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Rønnestad 30s MAP with 2:1 Ratio
goal: Maximize time ≥90% VO2max using fixed 30s intervals at MAP
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- Fixed 30s work at MAP / 15s rest at 50% MAP, repeated to exhaustion or up
to 3 sets of 13 reps
- 5 min rest between sets
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: High Work:Rest Ratio (5:1)
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 × 5 min at 105% FTP / 1 min active recovery at 60% FTP
- 5 min rest at 50% FTP
- 4 × 5 min at 105% FTP / 1 min active recovery at 60% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Low Work:Rest Ratio Sprint (1:8)
goal: Maximum power output with full recovery
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 6 × 10s ALL OUT max sprint
- 80s full recovery at 40% FTP between sprints
- 10 min at 65% FTP
- 6 × 10s ALL OUT max sprint
- 80s full recovery at 40% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP

title: Self-Paced 4 × 8 with 2:1 Ratio
structure:
*
- 10 min warm-up: 50–70% FTP
- 4 × 8 min self-paced (aim for highest sustainable power) / 4 min recovery
at 50% FTP
- 10 min cool-down: 50% FTP
